# my-podcast

> ⚠️ **Note:** This repository contains test material created while testing [PodcastStudio](https://github.com/fatemeh-avanade/podcast-studio) — a browser-based podcast recording and publishing app. The episodes and RSS feed here are not a real podcast.

---

This repo is auto-managed by PodcastStudio. It hosts:
- eed.xml — the RSS feed served via GitHub Pages
- pisodes/*.mp3 — recorded audio files

**Do not edit files here manually.** Use the PodcastStudio app to record, edit, and redeploy.
